<think>
The user wants to create a directory named `my_flask_app_test` and a file `app.py` inside it containing a simple Flask "Hello World" server.

Plan:
1. Use `str_replace_editor` with the `create` command to create `/workspace/my_flask_app_test/app.py` with the Flask code.
2. The tool will automatically create the directory `my_flask_app_test` if it doesn't exist.
</think>

<tool_call>
<tool_name>str_replace_editor</tool_name>
<arguments>
{
  "command": "create",
  "path": "/workspace/my_flask_app_test/app.py",
  "file_text": "from flask import Flask\n\napp = Flask(__name__)\n\n@app.route('/')\ndef hello_world():\n    return 'Hello, World!'\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    app.run(debug=True)\n"
}
</arguments>
</tool_call>
